name: Jacksepticeye
oneLine: Irish let's-play YouTuber known for high-energy commentary across indie horror, narrative games and PlayStation exclusives.
bio: Seán McLoughlin from Offaly, Ireland, started uploading to YouTube in 2012 and grew into one of the platform's most-subscribed gaming creators, hitting 10 million subs by 2016 and over 30 million by 2024. His channel mixes long let's plays of Sony exclusives and story-driven games with indie horror, comedy formats and reactions. He has also done voice work, including Shawn Flynn in Bendy and the Ink Machine, a role in Sonic Prime, and a part in the 2025 game Dispatch.
notable: Bendy and the Ink Machine voice role
